omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may work with background checks companies and credit referencing agencies who help us to verify users' identity and background information, and to screen users, including in connection with sanctions, anti-money laundering and know-your-customer requirements.

We share personal data, including customer telephone number and names (redacted where possible), with other users when sending or receiving e-money or issuing statements containing information such as transaction history.
